notes: Restricts incident closure to the configured approver or admin-level authority, including direct status edits and Kanban moves after rejection.
Adds an Admin SCADA Incident Intake configuration section with enable/disable, assignee, approver, collaborators, watchers, priority mapping, and optional ignored alarms.
Creates and links a SCADA Monitoring project from the SCADA configuration so future SCADA incidents use the normal project list and email notification path.
Adds a Windows SCADA readiness collector and operations documentation for AVEVA/SCADA evidence discovery without vendor support.
Adds regression tests for incident close authority and SCADA admin configuration.
